headline: UNH Showered Owners With Cash. The Stock Did Not Cooperate
summary: The health care giant sent a torrent of cash to its owners, but the stock itself told a very different story about the last five years.

raw.headline: UNH Showered Owners With Cash. The Stock Did Not Cooperate
raw.summary: The health care giant sent a torrent of cash to its owners, but the stock itself told a very different story about the last five years.

headline: Pharmacy Benefit Manager Suit Shows Trump Admin's Keenness For Deals
summary: Healthcare space has been a perennial target for US antitrust enforcers, but Trump's second administration has been much more willing than its predecessor to settle with insurers.

raw.headline: Pharmacy Benefit Manager Suit Shows Trump Admin's Keenness For Deals
raw.summary: Healthcare space has been a perennial target for US antitrust enforcers, but Trump's second administration has been much more willing than its predecessor to settle with insurers.
